title: I'm a Slave 4 U
why_this_song: I'm a Slave 4 U by Britney Spears (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Baby, don't you wanna dance upon me? (I just wanna dance next to you)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm a slave for you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I cannot hold it, I cannot control it"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Always saying, "Little girl don't step into the club""
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Baby, don't you wanna dance upon me? (I just wanna dance next to you)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "slave" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I know I may be young
I cannot hold it, I cannot control it

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Leave behind my name and age (let's go)
Leave behind my name and age

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "I'm a Slave 4 U" was released in 2001. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I'm a Slave 4 U" foi lançada em 2001. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "I'm a Slave 4 U" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "I'm a Slave 4 U" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
